Dele Alli is named in matchday squad for the first time in TWO years - as Cesc Fabregas picks ex-Tottenham star in Como side travelling to Roma
arts.sum: Former Tottenham star Dele Alli has been handed a career lifeline after being named in a matchday squad for the first time in two years. Alli is in contention to feature for Como against Roma.

arts.ttl: Serie A Preview: Roma vs Como – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: Stadio Olimpico is the venue as Roma and Como go head-to-head in a Serie A meeting in the capital for the first time since November 2002. Though only four places separate the teams before the kick-off, they aim for quite opposing goals this season. The post Serie A Preview: Roma vs Como – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Roma vs. Como: a match between two in-form sides
arts.sum: Roma have won their last three league matches without conceding a goal, while the Giallorossi have not achieved four successes in a row in Serie A since the period between July and August 2020. Roma have lost their last two matches against Como in Serie A (0-2 both on 25 January 2003 and last 15 December), the only time the Lombards have lost successive games against Capitoline club in the top-flight.
